member.name: T:Core.DTOs.Requests.AIDetectRequest
P:Core.DTOs.Requests.AIDetectRequest.AssignmentId
member.summary: The assignment ID the detection belongs to, used for authorization checks.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Requests.AIDetectRequest.ImageUrl
member.summary: Optional image URL sent by the client. When provided, it must match the assignment image stored by the backend.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Requests.AIDetectRequest.Exemplars
member.summary: 1-3 exemplar bounding boxes drawn by the user to indicate what objects to find.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Requests.AIDetectRequest.Threshold
member.summary: Detection confidence threshold (0.05 to 0.95). Lower = more detections. Default: 0.33

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Requests.AIDetectRequest.EnableMask
member.summary: Whether to return segmentation masks along with bounding boxes. Default: false (faster).

member.name: T:Core.DTOs.Requests.ExemplarBox
member.summary: A bounding box drawn by the user as exemplar reference for few-shot detection. Coordinates are in pixels relative to the original image dimensions.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Requests.ExemplarBox.Xmin
member.summary: X coordinate of the top-left corner (pixels).

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Requests.ExemplarBox.Ymin
member.summary: Y coordinate of the top-left corner (pixels).

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Requests.ExemplarBox.Xmax
member.summary: X coordinate of the bottom-right corner (pixels).

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Requests.ExemplarBox.Ymax
member.summary: Y coordinate of the bottom-right corner (pixels).

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Requests.ExemplarBox.Label
member.summary: Optional label for this exemplar (e.g. "Fish", "Car").

member.name: T:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectionBoxResponse
member.summary: A single object detection returned by the GECO2 AI service. Coordinates are expressed in pixels relative to the original assignment image.

member.name: T:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectionDiagnosticsResponse
member.summary: Diagnostic metadata describing what the HuggingFace / Gradio upstream actually returned for a GECO2 inference request.

member.name: T:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectResponse
member.summary: Response from the GECO2 AI detection service. Contains detected object bounding boxes and a processed result image.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectResponse.Count
member.summary: Total number of detected objects.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectResponse.ResultImageUrl
member.summary: URL to the result image with bounding boxes drawn by the AI. This is a temporary URL hosted by HuggingFace Spaces.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectResponse.Detections
member.summary: Raw detection boxes parsed directly from the HuggingFace / Gradio response when available.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectResponse.ProcessingTimeMs
member.summary: Time taken to process the request in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectResponse.Diagnostics
member.summary: Diagnostic metadata describing what the HuggingFace / Gradio upstream returned. Useful for distinguishing transport success from model-level zero detections.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectResponse.ThresholdUsed
member.summary: Threshold value used for this detection (0.05-0.95).

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectResponse.ThresholdAttempts
member.summary: All threshold values attempted for this request, in order.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectResponse.MasksEnabled
member.summary: Indicates whether segmentation masks were enabled.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Responses.AIDetectResponse.Message
member.summary: Human-readable status message.

member.name: P:Core.DTOs.Responses.ProjectDetailResponse.UnassignedDataItemCount
member.summary: Data items still in "New" status (no manager assignment yet). Matches task pick-up logic.

member.name: T:Core.Exceptions.AIServiceUnavailableException
member.summary: Thrown when the upstream AI provider is temporarily unavailable, such as during a HuggingFace Space cold start.

member.name: T:Core.Exceptions.PersistenceFailedException
member.summary: Thrown when a database save fails (e.g. constraint violation). Carries a user-safe detail message.
